report.summary: Cycle-close v11: +2 pages promoted (batch 12) bringing total to 494 published slugs. Zero new commits — deploy drift now 7 days. 762 uncommitted items (+4 from v10). 2 items remain in PUBLISH_QUEUE. 46 TS errors unchanged across 3 files.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: PAGE AUDIT: 494 slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES (+2 from v10: /learn/tokenized-treasuries-rwa-yield-guide-2026, /tools/funding-rate-tracker promoted in batch 12). 391 have page.tsx files, 103 missing — unchanged gap.

TYPESCRIPT: 46 errors across 3 files (structured-data.examples.ts, crypto-arbitrage-strategies-guide-2026/page.tsx, crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx) — identical to v10, non-blocking due to ignoreBuildErrors.
NO NEW REGRESSIONS: Zero commits since v10. No code changes to introduce regressions.
KNOWN ISSUES PERSIST: 103 published slugs without backing page.tsx routes (spans /learn, /wallets, /investing/best, /taxes, /blog, /defi-lending/reviews, /trading, /compare/exchanges).

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: API ROUTES LOCAL: All 6 core data route files confirmed present — prices (118L), trending (62L), fear-greed (47L), market-dominance (140L), defi-yields (149L), market-metrics (150L).

PRODUCTION STATUS: /api/market-metrics still expected 404 in production — route exists locally but is uncommitted. Other 5 routes presumed healthy from prior checks (egress blocked this cycle, cannot re-verify live).
CACHE TTLs: All properly configured — prices 60s/SWR 120s, trending 300s/SWR 600s, fear-greed 600s/SWR 1200s, market-dominance 300s/SWR 600s, defi-yields configurable/SWR 2x, market-metrics 60s.
RATE LIMITING: Zero rate limiting on all 6 core data routes — P1 carry-over. Only /api/health and /api/cache-stats have rate limiters.

sections.title: DevOps
items: LAST DEPLOY: Commit e999560 (Mar 17) — 7 days ago. Zero commits since last deploy.
UNCOMMITTED WORK: 762 items (up from 758 in v10, delta is new report files). Includes 48 changed files with +4,339/-3,464 lines.
CRITICAL UNCOMMITTED: middleware.ts, published-pages.ts (+157 lines), 20+ new page routes, /api/market-metrics, next.config.ts, sw.js.
DEPLOY RISK [P0]: 7-day drift is critical. All 156+ pages promoted since Mar 17 are invisible to users and Google. Every hour of delay = lost indexing opportunity.
SITE STATUS: Production site serving from Mar 17 snapshot. Egress blocked this cycle — could not verify live HTTP status.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DELTA THIS CYCLE (v11 vs v10): +2 pages promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES (batch 12: tokenized-treasuries-rwa-yield, funding-rate-tracker). +4 uncommitted items (new reports).
PUBLISH QUEUE: 2 items remaining — /learn/solana-developer-platform-sdp-guide, /learn/agentic-payments-protocols-guide-2026.
TOTAL LOCAL: 494 published slugs in local published-pages.ts. Production running ~338 from Mar 17 deploy.
ACTION REQUIRED [P0]: Commit all 762 uncommitted items and deploy to Vercel. 7 days of drift is the #1 blocker for the entire project.
ACTION REQUIRED [P1]: Fix /api/market-metrics 404 by including in next commit.
ACTION REQUIRED [P1]: Fix 46 TS errors in 3 files (structured-data.examples.ts, 2 learn pages).
ACTION REQUIRED [P2]: Drain final 2 PUBLISH_QUEUE items (solana-developer-platform, agentic-payments).
CARRY-OVER: Rate-limit 6 core API routes, build /trading page, build /compare/exchanges page, add missing page.tsx for 103 published slugs, add JSON-LD to pages missing structured data.
